mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bank_accounts ( user_id, fintech_use_num, access_token, refresh_token, bank_tran_id, bank_name, account_alias, account_num_masked, balance_amt ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{fintechUseNum}, #{accessToken}, #{refreshToken}, #{bankTranId}, #{bankName}, #{accountAlias}, #{accountNumMasked}, COALESCE(#{balanceAmt}, 0) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, fintech_use_num, access_token, refresh_token, bank_tran_id, bank_name, account_alias, account_num_masked, balance_amt FROM bank_accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, user_id, fintech_use_num, access_token, refresh_token, bank_tran_id, bank_name, account_alias, account_num_masked, balance_amt FROM bank_accounts WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bank_accounts WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE bank_accounts SET access_token = #{accessToken}, refresh_token = #{refreshToken}, bank_name = #{bankName}, account_alias = #{accountAlias}, account_num_masked = #{accountNumMasked}, balance_amt = COALESCE(#{balanceAmt}, 0) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND fintech_use_num = #{fintechUseNum}
